title: Share by WhatsApp & Email
metaTitle: Send Invoices on WhatsApp & Email · Free · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Send invoices, quotes and receipts by WhatsApp and email for free. Each document carries a pay-online link, so clients open it where they reply and pay in one tap.
keywords: send invoice whatsapp, share invoice email, invoice on whatsapp, send quote whatsapp, whatsapp invoicing, email invoice, pay online link
heroTitle: Send invoices where clients actually reply
heroSubtitle: Share any invoice, quote or receipt by WhatsApp or email in one tap. Each carries a pay-online link, so clients open it on the channel they use and pay instantly. Free forever.

features.title: Send on WhatsApp
features.desc: Share a document as a link or PDF straight to WhatsApp, where clients open and reply fastest.

features.title: Send by email
features.desc: Email a branded document with your logo and a pay button, tracked from sent to opened.

features.title: Pay-online link
features.desc: Every shared invoice carries a link so the client settles in one tap, by card or local method.

features.title: Any language
features.desc: Send in the client's language, including Arabic, English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu.

features.title: Reminders too
features.desc: Follow-up reminders use the same channels automatically until the invoice is paid.

features.title: One tap
features.desc: No copy-paste or attachments to manage, share any document in a single tap.

sections.title: Meet clients on the channel they use
sections.body: An invoice that sits unopened in an inbox does not get paid. Across much of the world, and especially the GCC, South Asia and emerging markets, WhatsApp is where business actually happens. Paper & Pen lets you send any document on WhatsApp or email, so it lands where your client looks, gets opened, and gets paid faster.

sections.title: Create, share, get paid
sections.body: Every Paper & Pen document is built to be shared and paid on whatever channel suits the client.
items: Create an invoice, quote, receipt or statement
Tap to share by WhatsApp or email
The client opens a clean, branded document with a pay button
They pay in one tap, by card or a local method
The payment records and reconciles automatically

sections.title: Global by default, local by strength
sections.body: WhatsApp and email sharing works for businesses anywhere, in five languages. In the GCC you get Arabic documents, native OMR, AED and SAR formatting and Paymob card payments built in. Everywhere else, you pick your language, currency and tax, and share the same way. One workflow, every market.

faqs.q: Can I send an invoice on WhatsApp?
faqs.a: Yes. Share any invoice as a link or PDF straight to WhatsApp in one tap, complete with a pay-online button.

faqs.q: Is WhatsApp and email sending free?
faqs.a: Yes. Sharing documents by WhatsApp and email is free forever on Paper & Pen, on every invoice, quote and receipt.

faqs.q: Does the shared document include a way to pay?
faqs.a: Yes. Every shared invoice carries a pay-online link, so the client can settle in one tap by card or a local method.
Yes. Send documents and reminders in the client's language, including Arabic, English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu.

faqs.q: Can I see if a document was opened?
faqs.a: Emailed documents are tracked from sent to opened, and you can see payment status update the moment the client pays online.

ctaTitle: Send it where they will see it
ctaSub: Create a free Paper & Pen workspace and share invoices on WhatsApp and email, with a pay-online link on every one.
